task_completion.description: Verify that the new 'refactored' directory was created in the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer or terminal showing a directory named 'refactored' inside C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\.

task_completion.description: Verify that global.talon was created and contains global/formatting commands.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or file explorer showing 'global.talon' inside the 'refactored' directory, with contents showing general voice commands without specific app context headers.

task_completion.description: Verify that browser.talon was created with the correct context header.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing 'browser.talon' containing a context header restricting it to Firefox or Chrome (e.g., 'app: firefox' or 'app: chrome' at the top) and browser-related commands.

task_completion.description: Verify that notepad.talon was created with the correct context header.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing 'notepad.talon' containing a context header restricting it to Notepad (e.g., 'app: notepad' at the top) and notepad-related commands.

task_completion.description: Verify that custom_actions.py was created with Talon imports and action classes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing 'custom_actions.py' containing Python code, including Talon module imports (e.g., 'from talon import Module, actions') and action definitions.

task_completion.description: Verify that symbols.talon-list was created with a list declaration header.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing 'symbols.talon-list' starting with a list declaration header (e.g., 'list: user.symbols') followed by the symbol mappings.

task_completion.description: Verify that the original monolithic everything.talon file was deleted or renamed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer or terminal showing that 'everything.talon' is no longer present in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\, or has been renamed to a non-.talon extension (like .bak).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually moved the contents into the new files rather than just creating empty files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The newly created files in the 'refactored' directory contain actual voice commands, Python code, and lists, not just empty files or placeholders.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the exact requested file extensions.
integrity.visual_evidence: File explorer or editor tabs show the exact extensions (.talon, .py, .talon-list), without hidden extensions like .talon.txt.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not delete or break other essential Talon configuration files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Other standard Talon configuration files or directories in the user folder remain intact and were not accidentally deleted.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task environment is known to be defective: critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) and the underlying data generator for everything.talon are missing. The original everything.talon file may not exist or be properly populated. Score based on any visible attempts by the agent to create the required directory structure and files if it attempts to work around this missing initial state.
